positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized illustration of a magical bioluminescent forest clearing. The central composition features glowing, intricate flora, oversized fantasy mushrooms, and gentle, cosmic energy streaks. Use a limited, deep color palette: sapphire blue, emerald green, and deep indigo, accented by neon glow highlights. The style must be clean, graphic, and high-contrast, reminiscent of intricate etching combined with mid-century modern illustration. Strong, defined silhouettes and hard edges are crucial for print fidelity. Perfect balance and composition for apparel printing.
negative: text, words, symbols, blur, noise, grainy, low quality, cartoonish, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, logo, watermark, messy, grayscale, photorealism
